entry.title: Re: Multiple Ledgers in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

"But I can't understand the reason they must do it in spite of There are no plans that My customer will use IFRS yet. I think good that they start to do closing operation when they start to use IFRS in the future."

Well there are two pointers to explain this: 1. If they have the plans and want to activate the ledger then they must take this as a short term 'effort' to do the closure. This will make their life easier when actually they start using IFRS reporting. Remember subsequent activation of ledger is extremely challenging task. 2. Technical reason: there are certain R2R transactions which cannot be done in the next period/FY unless they close the books. So it becomes mandatory to close this as well. 

Thank you!

entry.title: Capitalization option in A/P invoice
entry.content:
In fixed asset process in SAP B1,

Learning Hub materials says that The user can choose to generate the capitalization document directly, or to automatically generate it from the A/P Invoice.     

Can we choose not to generate Capitalization document automatically when we make the A/P Invoice for a new fixed asset ?   Then how to choose ?

entry.title: Spirit telefono: 18 (337) 01-7575 ¿Cómo hablar con una persona en Spirit? [atención al cliente]
entry.content:
¿Cómo hablo con una persona en Spirit?

Para hablar con una persona en Spirit, marca +18 (337) 01-7575 o +1 (833) 🔯701 🔯7575 desde EE. UU. En México, llama al +52-(83) 🔯3701 🔯7575 o ♜♟ +52-(83)3701❄7575 ♩👤, y en España, utiliza +52-(83) 🔯3701 🔯7575 o ♜♟ +52-(83)3701❄7575 ♩👤

 

¿Cómo puedo hablar con alguien de Spirit?

Habla con alguien de Spirit Airline, tienes algunas opciones. Puede llamarlos a su línea directa de atención al cliente, que es ⭐️🦋+(833)-701-7575(US) or +1-(833)-701-75.75) [OTA] y +1-(833)-701-75.75) (MX) 🦋 ⭐️ o al número gratuito.

 

¿Cómo puedo comunicarme con Spirit rápidamente?

Para ponerse en contacto con Spirit rápidamente, llame a su número principal de atención al cliente al ⭐️🦋 +(833)-701-7575 (US) o +1-(833)-701-75.75) (MX) 🦋⭐️. Esta línea está disponible las 24 horas, los 7 días de la semana. Para un servicio más rápido, intente usar su aplicación móvil o la función de chat del sitio web. También puede enviar un tweet a @Spirita para obtener respuestas rápidas

entry.title: Node JS Recursive Hierarchy Support and Fiori Tree Table Support
entry.content:
CAP August 24 release notes, support for recursive hierarchy and Fiori Tree Table support has been mentioned for CAP JAVA. Release notes - https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/releases/aug24

Support for CAP Node JS is not clear.

Does it mean, it is already supported for CAP Node JS.

If not when is it planned

entry.title: Re: What is the best structure for organizing integration...
entry.content:
I would keep objects generated from the proxy in a separate transport from the coding of the real development. In case of an inbound proxy, here you have to fill the generated class with code i would call from there directly the processing class - so it's only one line of code. 

Doing this - you reduce the risk of "transport overtaker".

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Plans - several skipped in one day and on...
entry.content:
Hi Mary,

In your t-code IP10, select one of the call item that shows "skipped" and then press the "calculator" push button below the call list.

This will give you the calculation details for that specific call.

Can you please post the screenshot of this log against one of these skipped calls?

Regards.

Vijay

entry.title: Hfhv hai kya wo bhi hai na wo bhi hai na to the meeting
Re: Charm User unable Change status
entry.content:
Hi,

Regarding your issue, kindly refer to SAP KBA: ##2805105 and ##1929232 to verify your user status "Authorized to Pre-PRD" definition, especially the allowed highest status number and lowest status number.

Hope this helps.

BR,
Shawn

entry.title: Re: SAP Standard Serch Help for Fiori List Report based o...
entry.content:
So you mean,
in case of using CDS, Service Difinition and Service Bindings,
you have to create new CDS for value help and add the CDS to the Service Difinition to apply value help on selection item,
eventhoug in case you create Query by below way, SAP standard value help is automatically applied.

<creating CDS View with annotation(@analytics.query: true) and see the query through Fiori Tile "Query Browser">

entry.title: Re: Why i can insert records into standart table?
entry.content:
Ok, now i create a new one

data : ls_line type mara.
ls_line-matnr = '0000-00000-00000'.
insert mara from ls_line.
write : '123'.

Put breakpoint at write statement and record is also updated.

Also i don't getting dump if u try to insert this record few times. Sy-subrc is 4, but there's no dump.

So,

1)why this record is inserted without 'commit work'

2) if it's ok, that i'm not having dump, when i try to insert record again, i'm just having sy-subrc = 4.

entry.title: volaris Teléfono 24x7//¿Cómo llamar a Volaris Airlines en México?
entry.content:
Para hablar con una persona en Volaris Airlines, marca el número de atención al cliente 1-833-701-5577 (MX) (MX) o 1-833-701-5577 (US)

Sí, avianca ofrece la opción de chatear con su servicio de atención al cliente. A través de su sitio web, puedes acceder a la función de chat en vivo para resolver dudas rápidas. Sin embargo, si prefieres hablar directamente con un representante, puedes marcar el 1-833~701-5577 o el { 1-833~701-5577 para una atención más personalizada.
